channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SYSTEMATIC] Systematic Industries Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Systematic Industries Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will be in effect from April 1, 2026, up to 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the half year and financial year ending on March 31, 2026. The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results to the Stock Exchange. The date of the board meeting for the consideration and approval of the audited financial results will be intimated in due course.

  • Systematic Industries Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives.
  • The closure will be in effect from April 1, 2026, up to 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the half year and financial year ending on March 31, 2026.
  • The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results to the Stock Exchange.
  • The date of the board meeting for the consideration and approval of the audited financial results will be intimated in due course.
  • Designated persons are requested not to enter any transaction involving the securities of the company during the aforesaid period of closure of the trading window.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Systematic Industries Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [CTE] Cloud Computing LLC, Promoter of Cambridge Technology Enterprises Ltd, Acquires Additional Shares Worth INR 22,23,00,000
item.description:
Pursuant to Regulation 7 (2) of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider trading) Regulations, 2015, Cambridge Technology Enterprises Ltd. received a disclosure in Form ‘C’ from its promoter, Cloud Computing LLC. The form discloses the acquisition of additional equity shares by the promoter. The total value of the acquired shares is INR 22,23,00,000. The acquisition was made on 25th March 2026. Post-acquisition, Cloud Computing LLC holds 55.75% of the company's equity shares.

  • Cloud Computing LLC, a promoter of Cambridge Technology Enterprises Ltd, has acquired additional equity shares worth INR 22,23,00,000
  • The acquisition was made on 25th March 2026
  • Post-acquisition, Cloud Computing LLC holds 55.75% of the company's equity shares
  • The acquisition was made in compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider trading) Regulations, 2015
  • The total value of the acquired shares is a significant portion of the company's equity shares

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CAMBRIDGE TECHNOLOGY ENTERPRISES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [NLCINDIA] Three Independent Directors, Including M.T. Ramesh, Complete Their Term at NLC India Ltd
item.description:
NLC India Ltd has announced that Shri M.T. Ramesh, Dr. Vasant Ashok Patil, and Shri Pradeep Kumar Saraogi, who were appointed as Independent Directors for a period of one year, have completed their term. They ceased to be Independent Directors of the company upon completion of their term on March 27, 2026. Consequently, they also ceased to be members or chairpersons of the respective committees of the Board of Directors.

  • Shri M.T. Ramesh, Dr. Vasant Ashok Patil, and Shri Pradeep Kumar Saraogi have completed their term as Independent Directors at NLC India Ltd.
  • Their term ended on March 27, 2026, and they ceased to be members of the Board of Directors and its committees on the same date.
  • Their appointments were made by the Ministry of Coal, the Administrative Ministry.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NLC India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SHRIDINE] Shri Dinesh Mills Ltd. Appoints Mrs. Tejal Rahul Amin as Non-Executive Independent Director
item.description:
Shri Dinesh Mills Ltd. has appointed Mrs. Tejal Rahul Amin (DIN: 00169860) as an Additional Director designated as Non-Executive Independent Director for a period of 5 years with effect from 28th March, 2026. The appointment is subject to the approval of the shareholders of the company. Mrs. Amin is a well-known personality in the corporate sector and has been conferred with the 'Young Entrepreneur Award' by the Indian Council of Social Welfare in 2016. She is also a Whole Time Director of Jyoti Ltd. and a Director of Navrachana Education Society, which has initiated 8 more institutions affiliated to National and International Boards. She has played a significant role in the qualitative expansion of these institutions. Recently, she has been instrumental in the Navrachana University getting recognition under the Gujarat Private Universities Act.

  • Appointment of Mrs. Tejal Rahul Amin as Non-Executive Independent Director
  • Mrs. Amin is a well-known personality in the corporate sector
  • She has been conferred with the 'Young Entrepreneur Award' by the Indian Council of Social Welfare in 2016
  • Mrs. Amin is a Whole Time Director of Jyoti Ltd.
  • She has played a significant role in the qualitative expansion of Navrachana Education Society institutions

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHRI DINESH MILLS LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CUMMINSIND] Cummins India Ltd Closes Trading Window for Q1 & FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Cummins India Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure is in accordance with the Company's Code of fair disclosures and conduct, as per Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window will remain closed from Wednesday, April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the approval of the financial results will be informed in due course.

  • Trading window closure for designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • In accordance with the Company's Code of fair disclosures and conduct
  • Closure from April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results
  • Applies to the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026
  • Date of Board Meeting for financial results approval to be informed later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CUMMINS INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [UNIMOVR] Manbro Industries Ltd Closes Trading Window Until 48 Hours After Q1 2026 Results
item.description:
Manbro Industries Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in the company's equity shares. The closure will be in effect from 1st April 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration and publication of the audited financial results for the quarter ending 31st March 2026. This announcement has been made in accordance with Clause 4 of Schedule B and Regulation 9 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Manbro Industries Ltd closes trading window from 1st April 2026
  • Closure is until 48 hours after Q1 2026 results
  • Announcement made in accordance with Securities and Exchange Board of India regulations
  • Trading window closure aimed at preventing insider trading

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNIMODE OVERSEAS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [LAL] Lorenzini Apparels Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for Q4 and Nine Months Ended December 31st 2025
item.description:
Lorenzini Apparels Ltd, in accordance with SEBI regulations and BSE circulars, has announced the closure of the trading window for the quarter and nine months ended December 31st 2025. The closure will begin from April 01, 2026 and continue till the completion of 48 hours after the declaration of the audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended as on March 31, 2026. All Promoter and Promoter group, Directors, KMP’s, Designated Persons/Employees, Connected Persons, Fiduciaries of the Company and their immediate relatives are advised not to deal in the shares of the Company during this period.

  • Trading window for Lorenzini Apparels Ltd to close from April 01, 2026 till the completion of 48 hours after the declaration of the audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended as on March 31, 2026.
  • All Promoter and Promoter group, Directors, KMP’s, Designated Persons/Employees, Connected Persons, Fiduciaries of the Company and their immediate relatives are advised not to deal in the shares of the Company during this period.
  • PAN of the involved parties will be frozen by the Depository for the Company's share.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Lorenzini Apparels Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [POLYMED] Poly Medicure Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Poly Medicure Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons in compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition to Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure will be in effect from Wednesday, 1st April, 2026 till the end of 48 hours after the declaration of Financial Results for the quarter and year ended on 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting to consider the financial results will be informed to the Stock Exchange in due course.

  • Poly Medicure Ltd closes trading window for designated persons
  • Closure in compliance with SEBI (Prohibition to Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Trading window to remain closed from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Financial Results for the quarter and year ended on 31st March, 2026
  • Date of Board Meeting to consider the financial results will be informed to the Stock Exchange in due course

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POLY MEDICURE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SHLOKKA] Shlokka Dyes Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for Designated Persons
item.description:
Shlokka Dyes Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in securities of the company by designated persons. The closure will be in effect from Wednesday, April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. The exact date of the announcement of the financial results will be informed in due course.

  • Shlokka Dyes Ltd announces closure of trading window for designated persons.
  • The closure will be effective from April 01, 2026.
  • The window will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the year ending March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shlokka Dyes Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [RAJESH] Jyotsna Patel Sells 1,50,000 Equity Shares of Rajesh Power Services Ltd on BSE
item.description:
Jyotsna Patel, a seller, has disclosed the sale of 1,50,000 equity shares of Rajesh Power Services Ltd on the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE) under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The shares were sold on 24/03/2026. Before the sale, Patel held 6,08,000 shares, and after the sale, her holding stands at 4,58,000 shares. The company has a total equity share capital of 1,80,07,392 shares of face value Rs. 10/- each.

  • Jyotsna Patel sells 1,50,000 equity shares of Rajesh Power Services Ltd on BSE.
  • The sale was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • Before the sale, Patel held 6,08,000 shares, and after the sale, her holding stands at 4,58,000 shares.
  • The company has a total equity share capital of 1,80,07,392 shares of face value Rs. 10/- each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajesh Power Services Ltd | Category: Sale
